Name: Claire Parker
Description: Claire Parker was born, alongside her twin brother Benjamin, to Peter and Mary Jane Watson in 1984 while her father was trapped on Battleworld with most of Earth's heroes and villains during the events of Secret Wars. Though Peter eventually returned, Claire's earliest days were fraught with turmoil as her father's dependence on the alien symbiote he had brought back from Battleworld was growing ever stronger, creating an ever-growing rift between her parents.
